Off Calendar Dec-10-2021 Continued To Mar-30-22 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Confirm Ownership Of Trust Property And Authorize Conveyance
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Horcher appeared by zoom for Daniel Joseph (Objector).

The court noted that the petitioner is not present. Mr. Horcher asked the court if it will be addressing the issue of sanctions. The court stated that it will look at Mr. Horcher's request. The Petition to Confirm Ownership of Trust Property and Authorize Conveyance is under submission with the court's intent to deny the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
